name: Chicken-Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt butter in a large saucepan over low heat.
3. Blend in flour, salt, and pepper.
4. Cook over low heat, stirring until the mixture is smooth and bubbly.
5. Remove from heat. Stir in broth and milk.
6. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly. Boil and stir 1 minute.
7. Stir in remaining ingredients.
8. Pour into an ungreased baking dish (10x6x1.5 inches) or a 1 1/2-quart casserole.
9. Bake uncovered for 40 to 45 minutes.
10. Sprinkle with chopped parsley before serving.
